title: The worthlessness of Vitamin D is mildly exaggerated
summary: 文章探讨了维生素D补充剂的争议，认为其价值被过度贬低，并分析了相关研究的局限性。
translated_summary: The article discusses the controversy over vitamin D supplements, arguing that their value is mildly exaggerated in a negative direction, and analyzes the limitations of related studies.
